items.author: PowerfulJRE
items.content:

items.title: Joe Rogan Experience #2496 - Julia Mossbridge
items.author: PowerfulJRE
items.content:
<article>Julia Mossbridge, PhD, is a cognitive neuroscientist, author, and educator. She is the founder and president of American Electrodynamics, the co-founder and chief science officer of Applied Love Labs, and a senior advisor for American DeepTech. Her latest book, “Have a Nice Disclosure!,” is available now.

https://www.youtube.com/@JuliaMossbridge

items.content:

Burchett is a member of the UAP Caucus, chairman of the DOGE Subcommittee, and serves on the House Committees on Oversight and Government Reform, Foreign Affairs, and Transportation and Infrastructure.
